dialogueChunks.intro: Look at the land, {player_name}. Nothing has grown here in weeks. The soil itself rejects everything we try.
dialogueChunks.plotStep: It started when a work crew near {quest_origin} disturbed something ancient {location_hint}. Nobody thought much of it at the time. But the {quest_threat} struck overnight. {target_npc} says the disturbance awakened something that considers this land its own. The {enemy_type} have been drawn to the blighted areas. We need {quest_item} to restore what was broken.
dialogueChunks.outro: We didn't mean to trespass on something sacred. But intentions don't matter when the {quest_stakes} {quest_stakes_is} at risk. {quest_reward_hint} might come of setting things right.

dialogueChunks.intro: {player_name}, I don't believe in ghost stories. At least, I didn't until three nights ago.
dialogueChunks.plotStep: The builders expanding the settlement dug into {quest_origin} {location_hint}. Since then, the {quest_threat} {quest_threat_has} manifested: lights move at night, tools shatter without being touched, guards see figures that vanish in the fog. {target_npc} consulted the oldest records and found references to a ritual that requires {quest_item} to set things right. The {enemy_type} in the area have become agitated too.
dialogueChunks.outro: The {quest_stakes} needs this resolved. I'm asking you because everyone else is too frightened to go near the {quest_focus}. {quest_reward_hint} would be a welcome outcome.

dialogueChunks.intro: Don't drink from the well, {player_name}. I'm serious. Not a single drop.
dialogueChunks.plotStep: The spring that feeds the settlement runs through a cavern {location_hint} that our miners breached. The {quest_focus} turned dark the same day. People who consumed it before we realized have fallen ill. {target_npc} is barely keeping them alive. The miners say they saw warnings carved in the walls. Something down there is contaminating the water deliberately, and the {enemy_type} nesting near the entrance seem to be guarding it.
dialogueChunks.outro: We violated something we didn't understand, and now the {quest_stakes} {quest_stakes_is} paying for it. We need {quest_item} to purify the source. {quest_time_pressure}.
